title: SC-401 stun cuffs

'''SC-401 stun cuffs''' were a model of [[Stuncuffs/Legends|stuncuffs]] manufactured by [[Locris Syndicated Securities/Legends|Locris Syndicated Securities]]. Combining traits of both [[Binders/Legends|binders]] and [[Magnacuffs/Legends|magnacuffs]], the [[Durasteel/Legends|durasteel]] restraints were adaptable for most [[Species/Legends|species]] and capable of delivering a [[Stun/Legends|stun]] charge to keep unruly [[Prisoner/Legends|prisoners]] in line.

==Description==
SC-401 stun cuffs were manufactured by [[Locris Syndicated Securities/Legends|Locris Syndicated Securities]]. 
Constructed of reinforced [[Durasteel/Legends|durasteel]], SC-401 stun cuffs consisted of two circular cuffs that could be opened and secured by a [[magnetic lock]] that were joined together by a restraint bar. A rotation joint at each end of the restraint bar allowed each cuff a degree of movement.<ref name="EGWT" /> The unit incorporated traits from the most successful designs of standard [[Binders/Legends|binders]] and [[Magnacuffs/Legends|magnacuffs]]. They looked nearly identical to standard binders, and many [[Prisoner/Legends|prisoners]] could not tell the difference between the two designs.<ref name="NEGWT" />

The cuffs were adjustable, allowing them to fit the wrists<ref name="NEGWT" /> or physiologically similar appendages<ref name="AE">''[[Arms & Equipment Guide]]''</ref> of nearly any [[Species/Legends|species]], ranging from [[Ugnaught/Legends|Ugnaughts]] to [[Gamorrean/Legends|Gamorreans]],<ref name="NEGWT" /> and were strong enough to restrain a [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]].<ref name="EGWT" /> [[Sensor/Legends|Sensors]] built into the cuffs registered if the prisoner was straining against their bonds<ref name="NEGWT" /> or attempting to remove their hands. The cuffs would then automatically tighten against the wearer's wrists. Persistent attempts would result in the cuffs cutting off circulation to the hands,<ref name="EGWT" /> or in extreme cases, crush the prisoner's wrists.<ref name="NEGWT" />

The cuffs' restraints and [[Lock/Legends|locking]] mechanism were reinforced by channelling [[Magnetic field/Legends|magnetic fields]] through them using a [[Magnetic Restraint Module]]. This process effectively tripled the strength of the durasteel. Each cuff was lined with [[stun filament]]s that were capable of releasing a paralyzing jolt of energy through [[stun panel]]s when activated by a remote control unit. The energy has a variable setting; on lower levels, the [[Stun/Legends|stun]] blast caused the prisoner to experience pain<ref name="EGWT" /> as a means to get them back in line or to cooperate.<ref name="NEGWT" /> On higher levels, the stun blast could paralyze the prisoner's arms,<ref name="NEGWT" /> or render the prisoner unconscious.<ref name="EGWT" /> The magnetic field and stun filaments were powered by an internal [[Power cell/Legends|power pack]].<ref name="AE" />

The SC-401 was controlled by a remote control unit, and each unit could be linked to, and send instructions to, forty pairs of stun cuffs, allowing a single controller to effectively oversee a large number of prisoners. The unit incorporated a keypad and a readout screen, and had a broadcast range of fifty [[Meter/Legends|meters]]. The remote allowed the cuffs to be programmed in a variety of ways. Functions included setting tension control that allowed an acceptable level of movement and resistance from the prisoner before the cuffs automatically tightened; the level of intensity of the stun changes; and even an option for the cuffs to automatically shock a prisoner if they moved more than ten meters away from the controller unit. Opening the cuffs required the input of a seven-digit master code into the control unit, and the command codes could be reprogrammed as needed.<ref name="EGWT" />

Each cuff had an access panel built into it that could be flipped up to reveal identification panel and setting controls. A pair of the cuffs cost one hundred [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]], and a remote controller unit cost five hundred credits.<ref name="EGWT" />

==History==
SC-401 stun cuffs were used by [[Law enforcement agency/Legends|law enforcement agencies]] and [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunters]] to restrain prisoners.<ref name="AE" /> They were also used by the security forces stationed aboard the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire's]] [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|DS-1 Orbital Battle Station]].<ref name="NEGWT" />
